layers.name: Animated UI Components
layers.description: React components that render animated mind‑map and code‑line visualizations for video compositions.

layers.name: Project Configuration Files
layers.description: Declarative settings and plugin definitions used by the Remotion and Opencode tooling.

layers.name: Video Forge Utilities
layers.description: Helper modules providing rendering shortcuts and status‑monitoring functions for the video generation pipeline.

layers.name: Video Forge Core Engine
layers.description: Primary application layer containing models, rendering engine, orchestrators, fetchers, and exception handling that drive video creation and review.

layers.name: Documentation & Build Scripts
layers.description: Project documentation and auxiliary scripts for orchestrating, running the TTS server, and generating videos.

layers.name: Remotion Test Suite
layers.description: Contains Jest/React and pytest test cases and setup for the Remotion video composition project.

tour.title: Repository Overview
tour.reason: Start here for the end-to-end picture before diving into the code.

tour.reason: An entry point — execution and imports fan out from here.
